title: Field Management on Informix
text: Field Management on Informix Uniface allows letters, numbers, and underscores as field names. The first character must be a letter. Segmented Field Support The INF connector never uses stored procedures to manipulate segmented fields and does not create insert or update stored procedures for tables containing segmented fields. The connector creates other stored procedures, but these do not retrieve or modify segmented fields. The connector uses dynamic SQL to execute the relevant read , write , and update requests.
